subcodes.first_line: The blessed Lote-Tree doth in this hour make mention of its leaves with such remembrance as shall guide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سدره مبارکه در این حین اوراق خود را ذکر مینماید بذکریکه سبب هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
